zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Herries於1404年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，他的父親Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles24歲，母親Lady Margaret Douglas25歲。他於大約1435年與Elizabeth McClellan在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1483年5月26日享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Herries于1404年出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，他的父亲Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles24岁，母亲Lady Margaret Douglas25岁。他于大约1435年与Elizabeth McClellan在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1483年5月26日享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish, English: locative name from Hérils in Trévières (Calvados). The name in England may have died out before the end of the medieval period, but survived into the modern period in Scotland.
2 English: variant of Herry with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Harris .

variants.name: Herry
meanings: Scots: Herry, to plunder, most properly to plunder birds' nests

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Herries was born in 1404, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles, was 24 and his mother, Lady Margaret Douglas, was 25. He married Elizabeth McClellan about 1435, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 26 May 1483, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Herries est né en 1404, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Douglas, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth McClellan environ 1435, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1483, à l’âge de 79 ans.

Er hat um 1435 in Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth McClellan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 26. Mai 1483 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

Lui sposato Elizabeth McClellan circa 1435, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 26 maggio 1483, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Herriesが1404年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Herbert Herries third of Terreglesは24歳，母Lady Margaret Douglasは25歳であった。約1435年にイギリススコットランドでElizabeth McClellanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1483年5月26日に79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Herries(이)가 1404년 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Douglas(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1435년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Elizabeth McClellan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1483년 5월 26일 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth McClellan aproximadamente 1435, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1483, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Herries родился в 1404 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Herbert Herries third of Terregles было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Douglas, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth McClellan около 1435 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 26 мая 1483 г. в возрасте 79 лет.
